completed_features: Prisma schema for Movie, Watch, Genre, MovieGenre, ExternalSourceMap, and SyncRun
Movie card and movie grid components
pending_features: Run Prisma migration against real database
Validate browser Sync button against real database
Validate IMDb persisted sync outside Codex environment
Add source status and last synced UI

database_status.known_issue: DATABASE_URL is missing in the current workspace, so API routes that query Prisma cannot return real movie data yet.

letterboxd.pagination: follows Letterboxd next pagination links up to 250 pages
letterboxd.watchedDate: not available from current films grid, stored as null

imdb.pagination: supports next links and paginationKey links up to 250 pages
imdb.rating_normalization: IMDb 10-point ratings are divided by 2 to match MovieVault 5-point scale
imdb.known_issue: IMDb returned HTTP 202 with an empty body in the Codex environment, likely bot-gating.

deduplication.source_records: ExternalSourceMap and Watch are upserted per source
known_limitations: Different source years may create duplicates

search_status.current_behavior: loads compact movie data into browser and searches locally
planned_optimizations: server-side fallback search if dataset grows very large

blockers.name: Missing DATABASE_URL
blockers.description: The app cannot load or persist movies until a PostgreSQL connection string is added to .env and migrations are applied.

blockers.name: IMDb bot-gating
blockers.description: IMDb returned HTTP 202 with an empty body from the Codex environment. The provider needs validation from another runtime or a fallback strategy.

blockers.name: No persisted sync validation
blockers.description: Scraper-to-database sync has not been tested against a real configured database in this workspace.

next_task.title: Configure PostgreSQL and validate browser sync
steps: Confirm Movie, Watch, ExternalSourceMap, and SyncRun rows are created
